# terrible_cloudscale_ch_cloud_custom_image (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `firmware_type` (String) The firmware type that will be used for servers created with this image.
- `force_retry` (Boolean) Retry the image import even if a failed import using the same name and URL already exists. This is necessary to recover from download errors.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `name` (String) The human readable name of the custom image. Either name or UUID must be present to change an existing image.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `slug` (String) A string identifying the custom image for use within the API.
- `source_format` (String) The file format of the image referenced in the url.
- `state` (String) State of the coustom image.
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `url` (String) The URL used to download the image.
- `user_data_handling` (String) How user_data will be handled when creating a server. There are currently two options, "pass-through" and "extend-cloud-config".
- `uuid` (String) The unique identifier of the custom image import. Either name or UUID must be present to change an existing image.
- `zones` (String) Specify zones in which the custom image will be available (e.g. `lpg1` or `rma1`).

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `checksums` (String) The checksums of the custom image as key and value pairs. The algorithm (e.g. sha256) name is in the key and the checksum in the value. The set of algorithms used might change in the future.
- `created_at` (String) The creation date and time of the resource.
- `error_message` (String) Error message in case of a failed import.
- `href` (String) The API URL to get details about this resource.
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `import_status` (String) Shows the progress of an import. Values are one of "started", "in_progress", "success" or "failed".
